name: claude-monitor-research
mission: Research how to detect and monitor running Claude Code CLI instances from a Node.js process. Find: (1) How to detect running claude processes (ps, pgrep, /proc), (2) What command-line args are visible and how to parse them (model, max-turns, session-id, -p prompt), (3) Where Claude Code stores session data on disk (~/.claude/), (4) How to get CPU/memory usage per process from Node.js, (5) Whether claude --output-format stream-json provides real-time events, (6) What existing terminal dashboard frameworks work best for Node.js (blessed, blessed-contrib, ink). Focus on macOS compatibility.
